tr.td: Minimum Ethernet frame size required by NIC

ol.li: Seqlock Protocol: Cache updates increment sequence counter (odd=busy, even=stable). Lookups must verify seq_start == seq_end.
Buffer Lifecycle: The data buffer 0x7f... is locked in pending_queue. No double-free allowed during ARP wait.
Bypass Path: Stack operates in user-space using UMEM regions, bypassing kernel sk_buff allocation overhead.
